description_long: This is a rectangular, light blue and white milk carton with a peaked top and a small spout at the center of the top edge. The front face features the word 'Milk' in bold black letters above a cartoon cow's face, giving it a playful and recognizable appearance. The sides of the carton are plain, with one side displaying a simple, outlined nutrition label. The top of the carton is folded in the classic gable-top style, commonly used for liquid containers. The surface appears smooth and matte, typical of coated paperboard packaging. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for everyday use in urban environments.
description: A light blue and white rectangular milk carton with a gable-top and a cartoon cow logo on the front. It features a nutrition label on one side and a small spout at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Milk' label and cartoon cow face prominently on a white panel.
description_view_1: Side view with plain light blue and white surfaces, no visible labels or graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front but without any text or graphics.
description_view_3: Side view featuring a simple nutrition label outlined in black on a white background.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front face has the word 'Milk' in bold black letters above a cartoon cow face; one side has a simple nutrition label in black outline.
